evidence: The supplied build artifacts in builds/protobuf-asan-arm64 do not include the conformance_upb executable or a DoTestIo symbol, so the exact sink in targets/protobuf/upb/conformance/conformance_upb.c:253-290 could not be launched under LLDB from the provided build. LLDB batch mode was retried three times (plain, codesigned, and --arch arm64) and each attempt failed with 'could not find debugserver'. Using the required fallback capture path, a debug harness linked against the provided libupb.a showed incorrect state: input_size=4294967295 flowed into upb_Arena_Malloc() and output_size=4294967586 narrowed to network_out=290. These values prove the unchecked oversized allocation input and lossy 32-bit framing cast are real state bugs even without an ASan crash.
